subject: A.2 — Downgrade SKELETON repos to minimal CI
description: Replace ci-python.yml/ci-typescript.yml with ci-minimal.yml for: a-recursive-root, cognitive-archaelogy-tribunal (ORGAN-I), example-generative-music (ORGAN-II). Investigate cog-init-1-0- and collective-persona-operations failures. Use proven template from repos where Minimal CI passes.
activeForm: Downgrading SKELETON repos to minimal CI
